SA20 Playoffs: Capitals’ Historic Comeback Shakes Standings

Jan 18, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

SA20 Playoffs: Capitals’ Historic Comeback Shakes Standings

The SA20 Playoffs witnessed one of the most sensational comebacks in T20 franchise history as Pretoria Capitals stunned fans with a remarkable turnaround against Joburg Super Kings.

After being reduced to 7/5 early on, Capitals’ batsmen Dewald Brevis and Sherfane Rutherford staged a thrilling 103-run sixth-wicket partnership, lifting the team to a competitive total of 143/6.

The stunning performance not only secured a memorable victory but also shook the playoff standings, reigniting excitement and speculation about the championship race.
